source_jobs.title: General Application
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PROVABLE

At Provable, our mission is to redefine trust and privacy in the digital world.

By creating tools that simplify the complexities of zero-knowledge technology, we empower developers to build applications that prioritize security, user control and scalability. We envision a future where privacy is not an afterthought but a fundamental standard, enabling a more secure and equitable Web3.

Our commitment extends beyond technology to fostering a vibrant, collaborative community of innovators. Through accessible resources, thoughtful design, and a focus on developer success, we aim to bridge the gap between cutting-edge blockchain technology and real-world applications. Together we’re not just building tools-we’re shaping the foundation for a private decentralized future.

We're a rapidly growing tech company (currently around 40 employees with millions in revenue) experiencing hypergrowth and making a significant impact in our industry.  We're building something truly special, and we need exceptional people to help us reach our ambitious goals.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Are you a highly organized, driven individual with a passion for execution and a knack for anticipating needs? Do you thrive in fast-paced environments and enjoy taking ownership of complex projects? If so, we're looking for a superstar to join our team and play a critical role in our continued success.

We value a strong work ethic, a positive attitude, and a collaborative spirit.  We believe in empowering our team members, fostering a culture of ownership, and providing opportunities for continuous learning and growth.  We're looking for someone who is not just looking for a job, but who wants to be part of something bigger and make a real difference.




OTHER MUST HAVES

 - Exceptional Execution: You're a doer, not a talker. You have a bias for action and a proven track record of getting things done, even in the face of obstacles.

 - Masterful Organization: You're highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and anticipate potential issues before they arise.

 - Stellar Communication: You're a clear and concise communicator, both written and verbally. You're comfortable interacting with people at all levels, from team members to executives.

 - Proactive Problem-Solving: You're not just reactive, you're proactive. You anticipate needs and develop solutions before they become problems.

 - Adaptability and Flexibility: You thrive in dynamic environments and are comfortable with change. You're able to adapt quickly to new challenges and priorities.

 - Team Player: You're a team player who is willing to go the extra mile to support your colleagues and contribute to the overall success of the company.

 - Integrity and Trustworthiness: You're a person of integrity who can be trusted with sensitive information.




BENEFITS

 - Industry-leading salary and comp package.

 - Monthly budget for expenses (home office setup & supplies, transportation, fitness & personal well-being, continued learning, etc.).

 - Comprehensive, top-tier healthcare coverage.

 - Flexible vacation policy.

 - Ability to attend major industry conferences and global events at the company’s expense.

 - Regular team off-sites and retreats.
   


Provable is committed to diversity in its workforce and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer and to review all of our job postings to minimize biased language. Provable does not make hiring or employment decisions on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, gender, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, sex, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation, citizenship, or any other basis protected by applicable local, state, or federal law. Provable will also consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records in a manner consistent with San Francisco’s Fair Chance Ordinance and similar local laws.‍

source_jobs.title: Senior Data Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PROVABLE

At Provable, our mission is to redefine trust and privacy in the digital world. By creating tools that simplify the complexities of zero-knowledge technology, we empower developers to build applications that prioritize security, user control and scalability. We envision a future where privacy is not an afterthought but a fundamental standard, enabling a more secure and equitable Web3.




THE ROLE

Provable is seeking a Senior Data Platform Engineer to own and scale our data infrastructure, pipelines, and data-serving APIs on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this hybrid role, you will manage the end-to-end data lifecycle: ingestion from our Aleo L1 blockchain indexers, pipeline processing, and the APIs that serve this data to our mobile privacy wallets and blockchain explorer.

This position is roughly a 60/40 split between core data engineering (infrastructure, pipelines, indexing) and backend software engineering (API development and database optimization). The ideal candidate understands blockchain data structures and is eager to solve the unique challenges of indexing zero-knowledge, privacy-focused networks.




RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Design, implement, and maintain scalable and reliable data infrastructure in GCP.

 - Build and optimize data pipelines fed by blockchain indexers to support our blockchain explorer, API, and analytics.

 - Design data models that effectively handle the unique privacy and cryptographic constraints of Aleo’s zero-knowledge network architecture.

 - Own, develop, and optimize APIs that serve data directly to our mobile privacy wallets and external products.

 - Manage and optimize database technologies, with a focus on Postgres and BigQuery.

 - Ensure data quality, reliability, and observability through monitoring, logging, and automated alerting.

 - Collaborate with product and engineering teams to understand requirements and deliver high-performance APIs.

 - Identify opportunities to optimize the performance and cost of data platforms.

 - Utilize infrastructure-as-code (Terraform and Helm) to deploy and manage data environments.

 - Help define the technical vision and evolution of our data platform and architecture.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 6+ years of experience in a Data Platform, Data Engineering, or Core Backend role managing production data systems at scale.

 - Strong proficiency in Node.js / TypeScript for API development and Python for data scripting.

 - Expert-level SQL and deep experience optimizing relational databases (Postgres) and cloud data warehouses (BigQuery).

 - Proficiency with cloud infrastructure automation, specifically Terraform and Kubernetes (GKE).

 - Excellent communication skills with a track record of taking end-to-end ownership of critical technical initiatives.




BONUS POINTS (NICE-TO-HAVES)

 - Experience with real-time streaming architectures and event-driven tools (such as Kafka, Debezium, Flink, Airflow, or dbt).

 - Deep understanding of Web3 infrastructure, blockchain data structures, and ZK-rollups or privacy networks.

 - Experience implementing monitoring and observability solutions (Prometheus, Grafana, or GCP native services).



Provable is committed to diversity in its workforce and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer and to review all of our job postings to minimize biased language. Provable does not make hiring or employment decisions on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, gender, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, sex, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation, citizenship, or any other basis protected by applicable local, state, or federal law. Provable will also consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records in a manner consistent with San Francisco's Fair Chance Ordinance and similar local laws.

source_jobs.title: Senior Accountant
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PROVABLE

At Provable, our mission is to redefine trust and privacy in the digital world.

By creating tools that simplify the complexities of zero-knowledge technology, we empower developers to build applications that prioritize security, user control, and scalability. We envision a future where privacy is not an afterthought but a fundamental standard, enabling a more secure and equitable Web3.



Our commitment extends beyond technology to fostering a vibrant, collaborative community of innovators. Through accessible resources, thoughtful design, and a focus on developer success, we aim to bridge the gap between cutting-edge blockchain technology and real-world applications. Together, we’re not just building tools—we’re shaping the foundation for a private, decentralized future.



The Role

Provable is seeking an ambitious Senior Accountant to report directly to the Accounting Manager and play a central role in running the financial operations of the business. This is a hands-on position with broad ownership and visibility, ideal for someone who wants real responsibility and exposure beyond traditional accounting.



This role offers the opportunity to work across all aspects of finance and accounting, including corporate accounting, treasury, tax, technical accounting, and data management, while becoming deeply immersed in blockchain and crypto technology. The ideal candidate is curious, detail-oriented, and excited to learn the financial nuances of a fast-growing Web3 company.



Responsibilities

 - Assist the Accounting Manager with financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and treasury management

 - Manage day-to-day financial operations, including cash flow monitoring and reconciliations of both fiat and digital assets

 - Support the development, implementation, and improvement of accounting systems, processes, and tools to increase accuracy and efficiency

 - Collaborate with external auditors and advisors; assist with audit preparation and ongoing audit support

 - Help develop, monitor, and report on the company’s operating budget

 - Provide financial insights and analysis to support key business decisions

 - Ensure compliance with financial regulations and support internal and external reporting requirements

 - Identify and implement opportunities to streamline and automate financial processes



Qualifications

 - Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or a related field.

 - CPA designation preferred but not required.

 - A minimum of 5 years of experience in accounting or finance.

 - Strong attention to detail and good problem-solving skills.

 - Effective communicator with the ability to work well in a team.

 - Familiarity with blockchain, crypto, or fintech industries is a plus but not required.



Benefits

 - Highly competitive salary and comp package.

 - Monthly budget for expenses (home office setup & supplies, transportation, fitness & personal well-being, continued learning, etc.).

 - Comprehensive, top-tier healthcare coverage.

 - Flexible vacation policy.

 - Ability to attend major industry conferences and global events at the company’s expense.

 - Regular team off-sites and retreats.



Provable is committed to diversity in its workforce and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer and to review all of our job postings to minimize biased language. source_jobs.title: Senior Protocol Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PROVABLE

At Provable, our mission is to redefine trust and privacy in the digital world.

By creating tools that simplify the complexities of zero-knowledge technology, we build applications that prioritize security, user control and scalability. We envision a future where privacy is not an afterthought but a fundamental standard, enabling a more secure and equitable Web3.

Our commitment extends beyond technology to fostering a vibrant, collaborative community of innovators. Through accessible resources, thoughtful design, and a focus on developer success, we aim to bridge the gap between cutting-edge blockchain technology and real-world applications. Together we’re not just building tools-we’re shaping the foundation for a private decentralized future.




THE ROLE

Provable is searching for an exceptional senior protocol engineer to help build privacy preserving zero knowledge protocols and products.

As a Provable senior engineer you will use your engineering talent to design, implement and maintain distributed systems and help build privacy preserving products on top of those systems. Collaboration will be key. You should be able to work well with engineers and leadership to turn our products and technical vision into deliverables each quarter. You should be able to clearly and thoroughly communicate your ideas.




THE WORK

 - Engineer distributed system components such as consensus logic, memory-mapped databases, networking stacks, and synchronization logic to be performant, safe, and correct.

 - Support our infrastructure engineers in maintaining our monitoring and alerting stack to ensure high uptime and streamlined debugging. Participate in an on-call rotation to respond promptly to production incidents and outages.

 - Make protocols accessible to product teams by wrapping key functionality in clean interfaces and APIs.




KEY QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years of software engineering experience

 - 2-3+ years of professional Rust experience

 - A strong foundation in blockchain concepts and ideally, experience contributing to a blockchain project

 - Low-level system programming and/or distributed systems design experience



Provable is committed to diversity in its workforce and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer and to review all of our job postings to minimize biased language. Provable does not make hiring or employment decisions on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, gender, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, sex, gender expression or identity, sexual orientation, citizenship, or any other basis protected by applicable local, state, or federal law. Provable will also consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records in a manner consistent with San Francisco’s Fair Chance Ordinance and similar local laws.‍

Global Data Privacy Notice for Job Candidates and Applicants

Depending on your location, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) may regulate the way we manage the data of job applicants.
